The '''Loratus Mobile Proton Torpedo Launcher''', or the '''MPTL-L''', was a [[Crawler (vehicle)|crawler-type]] [[Artillery/Legends|artillery]] mobile weapons platform fitted with a [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] [[Proton torpedo launcher/Legends|launcher]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the early stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SW:FC" /> One of the units was brought along with a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] strike team during the early portions of the [[Battle of Hanoon]]<ref name="SW:GB" /> in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the [[Battle of Hanoon]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]].</ref>

It was manufactured by [[Loratus Manufacturing|Loratus]] and was a mobile parabolic projectile platform that was made for taking out enemy units at far range with the help of a spotter. These units were also capable of laying mines to blow up unwary [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] units.

They had an advantage over many other types of heavy artillery, such as being able to fire their ordnance with reasonable accuracy while on the move—useful during raiding operations and in avoiding counter-battery fire.

The MPTL-L was the precursor to the [[Mobile Proton Torpedo Launcher-2a|MPTL-2a]] vehicle, a medium artillery variant. Both, however, saw contemporary use throughout the Galactic Civil War.

The MPTL-L was capable of being upgraded to a heavier version.<ref name="SW:GB" />

[[File:RebelProtonLauncher.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Multiple views of the MPTL-L. {{C|top row}}]]

==Behind the scenes==
The MPTL appears in several ''[[Star Wars]]'' real-time strategy [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s.
